"'''The Shard of Alderaan'''" was a live-action roleplaying adventure from ''[[Live-Action Adventures]]''. The game was designed for ten participants, and lasts three to four hours.

{{Game-stub}}

==Plot summary==
The [[Shard of Alderaan]] - a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] program able to decode [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Scandoc/Legends|scandocs]] has been stolen and taken to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

The Empire, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and various third parties must meet aboard the ''[[Dune Princess]]''. When they are stranded by a sandstorm, they must work to resolve their objectives.
